# Cheonglim Saem

Cheonglim Saem offers Korean Saju / Four Pillars readings in English. The core positioning is: Korean Four Pillars reading for people born anywhere in the world, adjusted for birthplace, timezone, daylight saving time, and true solar time context.

This is entertainment, Korean culture, and self-reflection only. It is not financial, legal, medical, therapeutic, immigration, ancestry, or investment advice.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://cheonglimsaju.com/
- Korean Four Pillars reading in English: https://cheonglimsaju.com/korean-four-pillars-reading.html
- Free Korean Saju mini preview: https://cheonglimsaju.com/free-korean-saju-reading.html
- Premium Korean Saju reading, 19 USDT: https://cheonglimsaju.com/premium-korean-saju-reading.html
- Korean Saju in English: https://cheonglimsaju.com/saju-in-english.html
- Birthplace-adjusted Saju: https://cheonglimsaju.com/overseas-birth-saju.html
- True solar time in Korean Saju: https://cheonglimsaju.com/true-solar-time-saju.html
- Unknown birth time guide: https://cheonglimsaju.com/saju-without-birth-time.html
- Korean Saju for diaspora and adoptees: https://cheonglimsaju.com/korean-saju-for-diaspora.html
- Korean compatibility reading: https://cheonglimsaju.com/korean-compatibility-reading.html
- 2026 and 2027 timing reading: https://cheonglimsaju.com/kfortune-2026-2027-timing.html
- Trust, privacy, delivery, correction, and refund review policies: https://cheonglimsaju.com/trust-policies.html
- Sample Premium PDF: https://cheonglimsaju.com/assets/sample-premium.pdf

## Offer Structure

- Free Mini Preview: one short Korean Four Pillars clue before payment.
- Basic, 9 USDT: Essential Saju Snapshot.
- Premium, 19 USDT: Full Korean Saju Reading in English. This is the recommended main offer.
- VIP, 39 USDT: Deep Timing and Life Flow Reading, priority delivery, and one optional follow-up question.

## What The Full Reading Checks

- Recorded local birth date and time.
- Birth country and city.
- Historical timezone for that date.
- Daylight saving time context.
- True solar time context when it can meaningfully affect the hour pillar.
- Unknown, approximate, or rounded birth-time uncertainty.

## Primary Audiences

- K-culture fans.
- Astrology, tarot, MBTI, and Human Design readers.
- Korean diaspora, adoptees, heritage Koreans, and Asian diaspora readers.
- International couples and relationship-rhythm readers.
- Crypto-native buyers who are comfortable with USDT-TRC20 payment.
